trajectory.description: Starting fresh. Need to build GNN for molecular graph multi-task classification. Will use GIN architecture (proven for ogbg-molpcba), with proper NaN masking and class imbalance handling. Start with a quick baseline (few epochs) to validate pipeline and measure iteration time.

Observation: Exit code 139 (segfault) - likely from multiprocessing in DataLoader. No training command was actually run yet. Analysis: The segfault is likely from num_workers>0 with torch_geometric data. Need to run training with num_workers=0. Decision: Run training for 5 epochs with num_workers=0 to get baseline.

Observation: Exit code 139 (segfault) with ~6 second elapsed time - too fast for training. This suggests the segfault happens at import/startup. Analysis: The segfault might be from torch_geometric imports or data loading. Let me first test with a minimal script, then run training. Decision: Run a diagnostic first, then training with num_workers=0.
